pageContent.generalInfo: Welcome to the Bishop Estates Cabana Club!
pageContent.poolInfo:
Our beautiful pool is open daily from 9 AM to 8 PM. Remember to follow all posted rules.


next
pageContent.updates: Exciting news! We're starting renovations soon. Stay tuned for progress reports.

joiningInfo.text: Join our vibrant community! Fill out the form below to get started.fdaffsa

updatesList.title: Pool Renovation Started
updatesList.content: We're excited to announce that our pool renovation project has officially begun. Phase 1 includes resurfacing the pool deck and updating the filtration system.

updatesList.title: Spring Membership Drive
updatesList.content: New members are joining at a record pace! We've raised $20,000 toward our $200,000 renovation budget. Thank you for your support!
